title: dianthus tener subsp. fallens
intro: Dianthus tener subsp. fallens, also known as Pink Clover, is a plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Dianthus tener subsp. fallens include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, a tincture, or a salve, making it easily accessible for use in traditional herbal medicine.
